[[Doctor/Legends|Doctor]] '''Pineas Pontak''' was a bald [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] who created the [[Pontak Hypergland]].

==Biography==
In addition to desiring the Hypergland, the nefarious [[Gaar (title)|Gaar]] [[Suppoon]] also wanted Pontak himself so that he could put the scientist to work in his laboratories. [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] gave Suppoon both the Hypergland and its inventor during a meeting in Suppoon's palace, after one of his former test subjects, the [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] guard [[Thok (Gamorrean guard)/Legends|Thok]], exposed his location to Jabba. Since the Hutt had no intention of letting his rival survive the meeting, he had secretly removed Dr. Pontak's [[Brain/Legends|brain]], which left him a mindless [[Zombie/Legends|zombie]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Jabba the Hutt: The Gaar Suppoon Hit]]'' {{1st}}
